title: ecbolium bonneyanum
intro: Ecbolium bonneyanum is a flowering plant species native to the Western Ghats mountain range in India, belonging to the family Boraginaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Ecbolium bonneyanum include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
